title: LCID Stock Forecast 2026 - Lucid Price Targets & Predictions
text: TickerNerd forecasts Lucid reaching $8-12 range by end 2026 depending on execution. The forecast assumes successful Gravity ramp and cost reduction of at least 20%. If Lucid misses on both fronts, stock could decline to $3-5 range. Key forecast assumptions include: maintaining PIF funding, achieving Gravity profitability by mid-2026, and expanding robotaxi revenue. The forecast highlights that profitability achievement remains critical to valuation re-rating. Without profitability visible by 2027, further downside likely. The analysis suggests patient waiting for operational inflection before making investment decisions.
